project: SGA Labeling System (GHS) - UX/UI Improvement Plan

strengths: Native performance with no network latency overhead.
Direct hardware access for Zebra printer integrations.
Styled dialogs provide a pseudo-modern feel.
weaknesses: Lack of dynamic scaling across different DPI monitors.

strengths: Consistent visual hierarchy via Tailwind CSS.
Lightweight interactivity via Alpine.js tailored for warehouse tablets.
weaknesses: Strict-dimension thermal printing requires complex CSS media queries.

areas_of_improvement.current_issue: Loss of focus during scanning results in gibberish input into random fields.

proposed_solutions.desktop: Implement a hidden keystroke interceptor bound to <Key> at the top-level window to buffer rapid keystrokes globally.
proposed_solutions.web: Implement Alpine.js aggressive auto-focus on main search fields. Add audio/visual confirmation cues (green flash/beep) upon successful scan.

areas_of_improvement.current_issue: Dense tables on the Order Status Dashboard are unreadable from a distance (e.g., on a warehouse TV).

proposed_solutions.global: Transition to semantic color-coded cards or Kanban-style boards (Red=Error, Yellow=In Progress, Green=Ready). Integrate clear SVG Heroicons for quick status recognition.

areas_of_improvement.current_issue: Silent degradation during SAP connection loss or missing GHS data leaves users without actionable context.

proposed_solutions.data_entry: Highlight missing GHS fields (H/P codes) directly on the grid and provide a 'Quick Fix' inline modal to prevent PDF generation failures.

areas_of_improvement.current_issue: Users must blindly queue labels or generate a PDF to see if text exceeds label boundaries.

proposed_solutions.desktop: Generate and display a low-resolution PyMuPDF/Ghostscript preview image in a Tkinter Label before printing.
proposed_solutions.web: Build a live HTML/Tailwind exact-scale div preview that updates in real-time as users modify batch data.

areas_of_improvement.current_issue: Overwhelming column density in the unified product database view.

proposed_solutions.global: Adopt Progressive Disclosure: show only ItemCode, Description, and Status by default. Implement expandable rows/accordion views to reveal Pictograms, H-Codes, and Tara weights.

tasks: Map Tailwind palette to a global Tkinter theme dictionary.
Apply standard styling to all Tkinter frames, buttons, and styled_dialogs.py.
Migrate print settings (printer selection, offsets) to a dedicated discrete modal.
Review Tailwind templates for high-contrast ratios (combating warehouse glare).
Ensure critical chemical hazard warnings avoid low-contrast grey-on-white text.
Verify aria-labels are present across all web interactive elements.
